scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run anchor:build && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.build:docker: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.anchor:sync-idl: cp target/idl/solcasino.json frontend/src/idl/ && cp target/idl/solcasino.json backend/src/idl/
